meta_description: St. John's Wort (Hypericum perforatum) is a yellow-flowered herb with well-studied antidepressant effects for mild-to-moderate depression. Its active constituents (hypericin, hyperforin) inhibit reuptake of serotonin, dopamine, and norepinephrine. Multiple meta-analyses confirm efficacy comparable to low-dose SSRIs for mild depression, with fewer side effects in that population.
